author: driver--design-phase-4b-web-md-bbdc
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_web with 6 modules: (1) styles.rs - Style to CSS conversion, (2) aria.rs - AccessibilityInfo to ARIA attrs, (3) events.rs - DOM events to vitreous events, (4) dom.rs - DOM element creation and reconciliation with NodeId->Element map, (5) mount.rs - mount() function, (6) web_apis.rs - fetch/localStorage/history. Will update Cargo.toml with needed web-sys features. All code targets wasm32.
